query:
SELECT 'samples' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM samples
UNION ALL SELECT 'distributions', COUNT(*) FROM distributions
UNION ALL SELECT 'specialized_test_results', COUNT(*) FROM specialized_test_results
UNION ALL SELECT 'reviews', COUNT(*) FROM reviews
UNION ALL SELECT 'clearance_requests', COUNT(*) FROM clearance_requests
UNION ALL SELECT 'certificates', COUNT(*) FROM certificates
UNION ALL SELECT 'notifications', COUNT(*) FROM notifications
UNION ALL SELECT 'sample_history', COUNT(*) FROM sample_history;
